differences: Generic SaaS KPI cards were replaced with field-work status cards.
The welcome area now includes an AI assistant action panel.
Recent documents use wider cards with contextual descriptions and authorship.
The right rail prioritizes urgent notices and scheduled site visits.
suggestions: Preserve this information hierarchy when real data is connected.
Use the same document-first card treatment on project and wiki dashboards.
reasoning: The revised dashboard preserves the original shell while reducing analytics density and making documents, field work, and AI assistance the primary product signals.
